title: Big Tech Is Buying Up Open Source... Vite Is Next
summary: Better Stack discusses Cloudflare's acquisition of VoidZero, the company behind Vite and other developer tools, as part of a wider trend of big tech companies buying up open source projects and developer tooling. The video examines motivations behind the deal and questions whether developers should be concerned about consolidation in the open source ecosystem.
